Computer-Assisted Reporting Newsletter, 1990–2007

Browse Topics Search

Following the money

Darrel Rowland The Columbus Dispatch May 2000
Technology

Examining the origins of campaign contributions, this piece exposes the meticulous records kept by lobbyists for fund-raising invitations. Through simple Excel sorting, insights were gained showing legislative fund-raisers highly correlate with legislative sessions.

Examining the origins of campaign contributions, this piece exposes the meticulous records kept by lobbyists for fund-raising invitations. Through simple Excel sorting, insights were gained showing legislative fund-raisers highly correlate with legislative sessions. Additionally, Jan Van Vyven’s fund-raising efforts coincided with significant legislative deadlines, suggesting potential implications.

These findings provide readers with a rarely-seen perspective into political fundraising, using 'follow the money' methods to highlight the ecosystem around legislative campaigns.
